Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}Can I see it? Ooooh... Is this the limited-edition drink you can only get in Kyoto?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}I have to say, I love these rare drinks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}It's only available in the fall.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}You want some? Well... I can't let you have it for free.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}I'll need... let's say 5,000 yen, to part with it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't have enough money...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}You don't have the money? That's not good.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}You should always carry enough money for rare beverage emergencies![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}Wh-What!? Are you really going to pay me 5,000 yen for this!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}Wow, you must be a rare drink maniac![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}Thanks, though! Now I can get my own rare drink![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}Hey... Maybe you could help out a fellow rare drink maniac...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}Do you think if we made those persimmons into a drink, maniacs all over the country would like it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}I see... I guess you're not a rare drink maniac. *sigh*[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}Kansai, huh...? So even if I take the bus, it'll cost around 10,000 yen...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}Argh... How many drinks could I get with 10,000 yen?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}You like drinks too, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}But all of yours are normal drinks...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}That Kansai-only drink is so rare and awesome that everyone wants a sip![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}She doesn't seem interested in[n]the drinks I can buy here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}Kansai, huh...? So even if I take the bus, it'll cost around 10,000 yen...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}Argh... How many drinks could I get with 10,000 yen?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}A rare Kansai drink... I wonder how it tastes...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}That tree seems special for some reason... I wonder why it's there...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}Does it commemorate something?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}That tree is a persimmon tree, right? Do you think it'll bear fruit? I hope so![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}That persimmon tree is gonna be cut down! What a waste![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}I soooo wanted to try its fruit...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}Some people are protesting the decision to cut down the tree![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}I guess they want to try its persimmons...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}Nah, there must be another reason...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}I saw an old man pick a persimmon from the tree![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 322}It wasn't even ripe![n]{f 1 1}
